name: Epic Robot Combat Simulator
description: Hop onto your Combat Suit, prepare your weaponry, and hunt down all your enemies all over space! Are you skilled enough as a Mech Pilot? Find out now!
instructions: Desktop WASD Move around Number keys Change weapon Shift Dash Mouse Aim and Shoot Mobile Left Joystick Move around Right Joystick Aim and Shoot Use the buttons on the bottom right to switch weapons or dash
